reviews.comment:
Buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRNlo3dlRREAE

reviews.comment:
Regular la atención, no hay ningún tipo de prioridad para los socios, solo -5% en la nafta, teniendo en cuenta que se paga una alta cuota. Funciona igual que una estación de servicio de cualquier marca.

(Translated by Google)
The service is mediocre; there's no priority for members, only a 5% discount on gasoline, considering the high membership fees. It operates just like any other gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaklTMUZREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio como en todos los ACÁ

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, as always at ACÁ.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRNFoycmlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Podría estar mejor, por ser un ACA. Pero cumple. Hay que tener en cuenta que en temporada todo el mundo se les mete en los baños.

(Translated by Google)
It could be better, being an ACA. But it does the job. Keep in mind that during the season, everyone goes into the bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRNnJ2MlJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar buena atención de todo el personal.muy completo bien ubicado sobre la avenida 3y paseo 112...

(Translated by Google)
Good place, good service from all the staff. Very complete, well located on 3rd Avenue and Paseo 112...

reviews.comment:
El lugar bien merece una renovación y mejores descuentos x parte de ypf.  Buena atencion del personal.

(Translated by Google)
The place definitely deserves a renovation and better discounts from YPF. The staff is very helpful.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención siempre que vamos, lo malo las filas que se hacen y la espera para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
The service is always great when we go, the only downside is the lines and the wait to load.
